title: 修正无 active 分支的 Contract-less 门禁组合

sources.reason: No-active branch currently invokes Contract-dependent checks without a Contract.
Distributed no-active branch must match the host gate composition.
Regression coverage for no-active gate composition.

riskAssessment.reason: Only the no-active orchestration is changed; active Work Item behavior remains untouched.

executionDecision.reason: Correct no-active gate composition and verify it against the archived N2 behavior.

preReviewWarnings: Do not alter active Work Item checks or archive evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The no-active branch does not invoke Contract-dependent checks without a Contract.
The no-active branch runs status consistency, backtrack, coverage, ownership, and PR checks.
Host and distributed Makefile tests pass and the active branch remains unchanged.
Full project quality and Work Item finish checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: After N2 added ownership and PR gates, make check-ai still failed in no-active mode because check-ai-guards requires a Contract and treated an archived restricted change as unapproved.
constraints: Do not modify active Work Item behavior.
Do not edit archived N2 evidence.
intent.rationale: No-active mode must use checks that operate on repository state and PR evidence, while Contract-dependent checks belong to the active branch.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No-active check-ai with an archived restricted change passes when ownership and PR evidence pass.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the automated remediation loop, including the restricted Makefile gate change.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
